dependencies.description:
Jinja2 is a template engine written in pure Python. It provides a Django
inspired non-XML syntax but supports inline expressions and an optional
sandboxed environment.
dependencies.name: py-jinja2

dependencies.description:
A final implementation of JSONPath for Python that aims to be standard
compliant, including arithmetic and binary comparison operators.
dependencies.name: py-jsonpath-ng

dependencies.description:
Matplotlib is a comprehensive library for creating static, animated, and
interactive visualizations in Python.
dependencies.name: py-matplotlib

dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description: Python dependency management and packaging made easy.
dependencies.name: py-poetry

dependencies.description:
python-docx is a Python library for reading, creating, and updating
Microsoft Word 2007+ (.docx) files.
dependencies.name: py-python-docx

dependencies.description: PyYAML is a YAML parser and emitter for Python.
dependencies.name: py-pyyaml

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

dependent_to.description:
CodeChecker is a static analysis infrastructure built on the LLVM/Clang
Static Analyzer toolchain, replacing scan-build in a Linux or macOS (OS
X) development environment.
dependent_to.name: py-codechecker

description:
A set of command line tools and Python library for working with SARIF
files.
name: py-sarif-tools

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
